nasb.text: The sons of Simeon according to their families: of Nemuel, the family of the Nemuelites; of Jamin, the family of the Jaminites; of Jachin, the family of the Jachinites;

esv.text: The sons of Simeon according to their clans: of Nemuel, the clan of the Nemuelites; of Jamin, the clan of the Jaminites; of Jachin, the clan of the Jachinites;

cnv.text: 西緬子孫，按著家族，屬尼母利的，有尼母利家族；屬雅憫的，有雅憫家族；屬雅斤的，有雅斤家族；

ccb.text: 西缅的子孙有尼姆利族、雅悯族、雅斤族、
